title: lupinus perennis subsp. perennis
intro: Lupinus perennis subsp. perennis, also known as the perennial lupine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lupine family and native to North America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids, including sparteine and lupanine, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lupinus perennis subsp. perennis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
